text:
Market today: Tech sentiment is cautious, marked by increased Nasdaq volatility and job cuts from a major player like Microsoft. This suggests potential headwinds for the AI boom, which is a key driver for your concentrated tech/chip portfolio.

Your holdings: SOXL is a "SELL" at -23.52%, a leveraged position deep in the red. SPAL, a new leveraged ETF, is also down -11.17%. Both need close attention, especially with margin amplifying any further drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on SOXL's stop at 200 and SPAL's stop at 21.38. Monitor broader tech sentiment following Microsoft's job cuts and any further news on AI sector concerns.

Bottom line: Prioritize risk management on your leveraged, concentrated tech positions in this volatile environment.
plays: Respect SOXL's stop at 200; consider trimming if it approaches that level, given its "SELL" status and leveraged decay.
Maintain SPAL's stop at 21.38; this new leveraged position needs tight risk control.
Consider LRCX for a new buy at 349.85-349.23 with a stop at 347.77, as the scanner indicates a "BUY" for this chip name.
